basic_details.job_title: Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada – Peon, Cook and More – 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada Recruitment 2026 for 11 posts of Sports Coordinator, Kabaddi Instructor, Cricket Instructor, Kayaking Instructor, Physiotherapist, Superintendent (Girls), Peon, Cook. The Walk-in on 18-06-2026. For detailed information please visit Sports and Youth Welfare Dantewada official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Journalism (Sports) or Mass Communication, NIS Diploma and MPED, Bachelor of Physiotherapy, Graduate with Data Entry Diploma, 12th Pass
